summary: Tested photo features in FS detail view: photo filtering by intervention, delete button, upload with auto-open edit modal, and lazy loading. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Cache-Control header is overridden by Cloudflare proxy (no-store instead of max-age=86400). Backend code is correct but CDN overrides it in preview environment.

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7/8 tests passed - 1 failure due to CDN proxy override)

seed_data_creation: Uploaded test photos during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo features tested on FS#356 (id: 8d3a0111-8f03-45d5-a7eb-2cbfcc96ad85). All 4 reported issues have been fixed: 1) Photo filtering by intervention works correctly - legacy photos (no intervencao_id) only appear in first intervention. 2) Delete button works - calls handleDeleteFoto correctly. 3) Auto-open edit modal after upload works. 4) Photos use lazy loading and thumbnail URLs.

photo_filtering_by_intervention.details: Verified photos with intervencao_id only appear in their assigned intervention. Legacy photos (null intervencao_id) only appear in the first intervention. Tested across all 4 interventions in FS#356.

delete_button.details: Delete button works correctly. Clicking delete button calls handleDeleteFoto, photo is removed from database and UI updates with success toast.

auto_open_edit_modal_after_upload.details: After uploading a photo via hidden file input, the edit modal automatically opens allowing user to add observations without extra clicks.

lazy_loading_and_thumbnails.details: Photos have loading='lazy' attribute. Thumbnail endpoint (?thumb=true) works correctly.

backend_photo_upload.details: POST /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/fotografias returns correct fields: id, descricao, foto_url, uploaded_at

backend_cache_control.details: Backend sets Cache-Control: public, max-age=86400 but Cloudflare proxy overrides it. This is expected in preview environment.
